title: super+e/q: virtual cross-group workspace cycling with wrap-around
description:
Cycle workspaces across all groups via super+e (next) and super+q (prev).

Build a virtual ordered list of workspaces:
1. Non-grouped workspaces first (treated as a single group).
2. Then named groups in alphabetical order.
3. Within each group, workspaces ordered by local_number.

Wrap-around behavior:
- super+e on the last workspace of the last group -> first workspace of the first group (non-group if it has workspaces, else first alphabetical group).
- super+q on the first workspace of the first group -> last workspace of the last group.

When crossing a group boundary, switch the active group as part of the focus action.

Implemented as native subcommands swi3-groups next/prev (workspace-next-global/workspace-prev-global) in swi3-groups-client. Sway config bindsyms super+e/q exec the native commands.
